methodology: Greedy per-pick assignment using the independent model's 727-prospect board (kalshi-anchored + PFF tape) × each team's roster_needs, gm_affinity, scheme premium, and documented pre-draft visits. Diminishing-returns: each additional pick at the same position halves the need weight. Reach + over-value penalties applied per round band.
